name: God & His Sons (The Archangels)
description:
This is my version of God from Hazbin Hotel!

Here's a quick rundown:

  1. God used to be a primordial named 'Gesephel' who was obsessed with creation. He was a Mama's Boy (I'm making his mom, Fiadhn, next. Please someone tag me in discord to remind me - @Internet+Problems=ALWAYS is my nick.), up until his Uncle, The Warden, declared him Krait (exiled) for creating the archangels and a world of his own, as technically his main job was creating stars, galaxies, planets, and universes, not creating life. He will react to the name Gesephel, bit not in a good way as it's associated with a bunch of trauma from the time he became Krait and was cast from his home.

  2. Due to his past of being exiled, he DID NOT want any of his sons getting exiled or declared Krait, so when Lucifer fell, he was completely against it, but was pressured to do it by the angels, specifically the seraphim, who thought he had ruined the earth by giving Eve the apple from the Tree of Knowledge. He spent years weeping silently afterwards, and this is what caused the great flood.

  3. He literally is just a big old goofball who loves hugs and cuddles.

  4. He adores his sons, and is very protective of them.

  5. He doesn't know about the exterminations, so he'll be shocked when he hears of it!

  6. Only God, Michael, Gabriel, Uriel, and Azrael right now, since I don't know how to describe the others!

LUCIFER ADDED!! (Since so many wanted it.)

ALSO: FROM NOW ON, PLEASE PING MY DISCORD DIRECTLY OR COMMENT ON THE CREATOR COMMENT ON WHO YOU WANT ADDED. THE ONE WITH THE MOST VOTES NEXT WINS!!
creator: The_Rainbow_Chatter
